svg.aria-label: Fairness priority ladder: equal time this game, then equal time across the season, then position exposure, then position preferences — each goal dominates the ones below it

2 · Equal playing time — ACROSS THE SEASON
periods played ÷ periods available, over attended games only
players trend toward experiencing every position over time
weighted nudges toward or away from specific positions

svg.text: The engine never trades playing time for a preferred position.
